rationale: Educ. Code §31.0205 governs charter school eligibility for instructional materials and technology allotments. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax values, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict exists.
quote: An open-enrollment charter school is entitled to the instructional materials and technology allotment under this chapter and is subject to this chapter as if the school were a school district.
_note: Rule text concerns charter school instructional materials funding; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts. Indirect fiscal pressure on school finance formulas is not captured by this specific statute.
